creator: frederic.praca@freebsd-fr.org
text:
--- pkg-plist.orig      2011-03-12 19:24:05.000000000 +0100
+++ pkg-plist   2011-03-12 19:23:00.000000000 +0100
@@ -11,4 +11,6 @@

 %%SHAREDLIBS%%lib/libraw_r.so
 %%SHAREDLIBS%%lib/libraw_r.so.0
+libdata/pkgconfig/libraw.pc
+libdata/pkgconfig/libraw_r.pc
 @dirrm include/libraw


--=20
Mieux vaut pr=EAter =E0 sourire que donner a r=E9fl=E9chir.
